mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.employee_id) FROM assignments a INNER JOIN employees e ON e.employee_id = a.employee_id WHERE a.assignment_status = '02' AND e.work_status = '03' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.deleted_at IS NULL
AND e.sales_user_id = #{salesUserId}

SELECT e.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName,
e.work_status AS workStatusCode,
CASE e.work_status WHEN '01' THEN '待機中' WHEN '02' THEN '面談調整中' WHEN '03' THEN '現場参画中' WHEN '04' THEN '休職中' WHEN '09' THEN '退職済み' ELSE '不明' END AS workStatusName,
p.project_name AS projectName, a.contract_end_date AS contractEndDate,
DATEDIFF( a.contract_end_date, #{baseDate} ) AS remainingDays,
u.user_name AS salesUserName,
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF( a.contract_end_date, #{baseDate} ) < 0 THEN '03'
WHEN DATEDIFF( a.contract_end_date, #{baseDate} ) <= 14 THEN '02'
WHEN DATEDIFF( a.contract_end_date, #{baseDate} ) <= 30 THEN '01'
ELSE '00' END AS warningLevelCode
FROM assignments a
INNER JOIN employees e ON e.employee_id = a.employee_id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.project_id = a.project_id
INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = e.sales_user_id
WHERE a.assignment_status = '02' AND a.contract_end_date IS NOT NULL AND a.contract_end_date <= DATE_ADD( #{baseDate}, INTERVAL 30 DAY ) AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND e.sales_user_id = #{salesUserId}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.contract_end_date < #{baseDate} THEN 3
WHEN DATEDIFF( a.contract_end_date, #{baseDate} ) <= 14 THEN 2
WHEN DATEDIFF( a.contract_end_date, #{baseDate} ) <= 30 THEN 1
ELSE 0 END DESC,
a.contract_end_date ASC, e.employee_name ASC
